summary: Comprehensive Settings system testing completed successfully. All features working: Language switching (AZ/EN/RU), Dark/Light theme, Preferred Mode selection, Toggle settings, Backend persistence, Cross-page integration.
passed_tests: Backend Settings API - GET/PUT endpoints working
Language switching (AZ/EN/RU) with instant UI updates across all pages
Dark/Light theme switching with app-wide application and persistence
Preferred Mode selection (Bus First/Metro First/AI Optimized) with visual indicators
Toggle settings (Notifications, Comfort Priority, Accessibility) functionality
Save Settings button with backend persistence and success feedback
Settings persistence after browser page reload
Cross-page integration: Dashboard prediction still works
Cross-page integration: Map page theme updates correctly
Cross-page integration: Tickets page functionality maintained
Bottom navigation labels change correctly with language selection
Dashboard title translates correctly (AI Dashboard → AI Panel in AZ)
Accessibility note appears when accessibility toggle enabled
All translation keys working for 3 languages (az/en/ru)
SettingsContext providing correct t(), isDark, tc() functions
